description.value:
Prerequisite: Dodge, Dex 15.

Benefit: You may apply the effects of the Dodge feat to two targets simultaneously, or apply its effects to a single target twice (the effects stack). A target that you have applied Dodge to twice is still counted as having only one application for the purposes of feats and abilities such as Agile Riposte.
description.summary: You may apply the effects of the Dodge feat to two targets simultaneously, or apply its effects to a single target…
